test_statements_frag_11.note: Transpiler generates 'var' for JS 'const', and try/catch block is omitted

test_expressions_frag_112.note: -0 is an IEEE 754 artifact, extremely edge case. Node.js console.log(-0) displays '-0' while Zig displays '0'.

test_builtins_frag_157.note: 7/8 test cases pass. Only parseInt('xyz') → NaN fails because i64 cannot represent NaN. Acceptable limitation.
